meaning: Sea 波弗特海(靠美国阿拉斯加州东北岸和加拿大西北岸)
examples: The storm measured 10 on the Beaufort scale.
Shell has been at the forefront of plans to drill in the Arctic waters of the Beaufort and Chukchi seas.
But in 2008, Arctic sea ice extent was the second-lowest on record, with losses particularly acute in the Beaufort sea.
Security sources in Lebanon say six tons of high-explosives have been delivered to Beaufort.
Nestled in a garden rich with live oaks and azaleas, the three-story mansion faces the Beaufort River.
